title: Lakera Guard Request
description: Request payload for the Lakera Guard /v2/guard screening endpoint.

messages.description: OpenAI chat-completions style messages. Guard screens the last interaction in the array.

project_id.description: Project identifier whose assigned policy governs screening.

policy_id.description: Explicit policy identifier overriding the project default.

breakdown.description: When true, include per-detector flagging details in the response.

payload.description: When true, include match locations to support masking of PII and profanity.

dev_info.description: Developer metadata returned to aid debugging.
